title: Update the Last Updated Column when a Doc gets updated
excerpt: It looks like the Last Updated Column is affected by updates within a Monday document only if a change is made within the doc’s title, but not the body. This seems like an error. I would like to see the Last Updated Colu…

posts.author: JCDMI (James Ceart)
posts.cookedHtml: It looks like the Last Updated Column is affected by updates within a Monday document only if a change is made within the doc’s title, but not the body. This seems like an error. I would like to see the Last Updated Column if changes are made within a Monday doc body. It wouldn’t make sense for the item to be affected by dynamic widgets or anything, but body text would make sense.
